file_insights.purpose: Ollama adapter for dispatcher - enables card prompts to be processed by local Ollama models
key_features: Health check on ollama endpoint (exit 75 if unreachable - transient)
Curl-based API communication with ollama daemon
Structured file extraction from JSON responses embedded in LLM output
Configurable via OLLAMA_MODEL and OLLAMA_HOST env vars

exit_codes.75: transient failure (ollama not running/model not loaded)

changes: Keep temp_dir on failure for debugging (don't cleanup on error)
Unset CLAUDECODE before dispatcher launch (was blocking bop execution)
Fix sleep duration syntax from bare number to explicit 'ms' unit
Add missing 'false' return at end of poll_for_state function
Fix assertion expressions with proper parentheses
Add 'ignore' to pkill call to suppress non-zero exit when no process found

patterns_discovered.name: Adapter configuration pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Adapters use environment variables for configuration with sensible defaults

patterns_discovered.name: Exit code convention
patterns_discovered.description: Dispatcher adapters use specific exit codes for different failure modes

patterns_discovered.name: Path resolution in Nushell
patterns_discovered.description: Check absolute with str starts-with '/', otherwise join with pwd
patterns_discovered.code_pattern: if ($path | str starts-with '/') { $path } else { [$orig_dir $path] | path join }

patterns_discovered.name: Structured output extraction
patterns_discovered.description: Extract JSON blocks from markdown code blocks or raw JSON objects in LLM responses
patterns_discovered.approach: Use regex to find ```json...``` and {"files": [...]} patterns

patterns_discovered.name: Self-testing in adapters
patterns_discovered.description: Adapters include --test flag for local verification without dispatcher
patterns_discovered.purpose: Enable CI/testing without full dispatcher infrastructure

gotchas_discovered.issue: CLAUDECODE env var blocks nested dispatcher execution
gotchas_discovered.context: Test harness was failing because bop subprocess inherited CLAUDECODE from parent claude session
gotchas_discovered.solution: Explicitly unset CLAUDECODE before dispatcher launch: unset CLAUDECODE; nohup bop...

gotchas_discovered.issue: Nu sleep syntax requires duration unit
gotchas_discovered.context: 200 is treated as dimensionless number, not milliseconds
gotchas_discovered.solution: Use explicit unit: sleep 200ms (not sleep 200 or sleep '200ms')

gotchas_discovered.issue: pkill returns exit code 1 when no process matches
gotchas_discovered.context: Non-fatal operation but caused script to fail if no dispatcher was running
gotchas_discovered.solution: Use 'do { ^pkill ... } | complete | ignore' to suppress exit code

gotchas_discovered.context: poll_for_state function had loop but no return statement after loop exit
gotchas_discovered.solution: Add explicit 'false' return at end of function

gotchas_discovered.issue: Complex expressions in assertions need parentheses
gotchas_discovered.context: Nu syntax: assert ($expr) not assert $expr for compound conditions

gotchas_discovered.issue: nohup redirect syntax differs in Nu
gotchas_discovered.context: nohup bop ... o>> file e>&1 & doesn't work as expected
gotchas_discovered.solution: Wrap in sh -c: ^sh -c 'unset VAR; nohup cmd >> file 2>&1 &'

discoveries.approach_summary: Successfully implemented ollama adapter following established adapter patterns (health checks, model validation, exit codes), integrated into test harness with proper environment handling, and fixed multiple Nu syntax issues in test infrastructure. Adapter supports structured file output extraction and includes self-tests.

recommendations.suggestion: Document adapter interface contract: parameter order, exit codes, env var naming convention
Add integration test ensuring OLLAMA_MODEL and OLLAMA_HOST defaults are respected when env vars not set
Add timeout handling for curl calls to ollama API (currently unlimited)
Consider connection pooling or persistent curl connection for repeated API calls in same card processing
Add URL validation for OLLAMA_HOST to catch typos early (e.g., ensure http/https scheme)
Keep temp dirs on failure—already implemented. Document in test script comments.
